(module ArrayMax
  (defun arr_max ((xs : (Array Num)) (size : Num)) : Num
    (def max_val : Num (arr.get xs 0))
    (def i : Num 1)
    (while (< i size) (do
      (def current_val : Num (arr.get xs i))
      (if (> current_val max_val) (def max_val : Num current_val))
      (def i : Num (+ i 1))))
    (return max_val))

(module ProgressiveTax
  (defun round2 ((x : Num)) : Num
    (return (/ (math.floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100)))

  (defun income_tax ((income : Num)) : Num
    (def t1 : Num (min income 10000) * 0.10)
    (def t2 : Num (max 0 (min income 40000) - 10000) * 0.20)
    (def t3 : Num (max 0 (income - 50000) * 0.30)
    (return (round2 (+ t1 (+ t2 t3)))))

  (test zero         (assert-near (income_tax 0)
